title: Fix HealthcheckWorkflow KeyError on tasks endpoint

log.context: Fix HealthcheckWorkflow KeyError on tasks endpoint

Done. Here's a summary of the fix:

**Root cause:** `HealthcheckWorkflow` uses `continue_as_new` to loop, passing `previously_down` (the list of down URLs from the prior iteration) into each new run. At some point `https://hello.clung.us/api/tasks` was in `SITES` and ended up in `previously_down`. After it was removed from `SITES`, the next iteration's `results` dict had no entry for that URL. When the workflow tried to build the "recovery" alert via `results[url]`, it hit `KeyError`.

**Fix** (...(truncated)
